first_run.rationale: The score is identical in both evaluations. The core reasoning remains consistent, focusing on the candidate being overqualified and having insufficient German language skills. Minor differences in the phrasing of strengths and the secondary concerns (niche languages vs. a missing specific tech stack) are well within the range of normal run-to-run variation and are not connected to the change in university.
